name: temperature-converter-cli
goal: Build a Python CLI tool tempconv.py using argparse. Usage: 'python3 tempconv.py --from celsius --to fahrenheit 100'. Supported units (--from / --to): celsius, fahrenheit, kelvin. The script prints the converted numeric value to stdout (with up to 2 decimal places, no trailing units). Exit code 0 on success, non-zero on invalid unit. Also write test_tempconv.py with pytest tests using subprocess.run to invoke the CLI and check stdout for at least: C->F (100->212.00), F->C (32->0.00), C->K (0->273.15), K->C (273.15->0.00), and an invalid-unit failure path. Run pytest and confirm all tests pass.

notes.purpose: Tier 1 CLI tool with both internal pytest test and an external command_succeeds smoke. The combination protects against a common LLM failure: passing internal mocks while breaking the actual CLI invocation.
